title: Notification of intention to prepare Environmental Delivery Plans
body: "A letter of notification to the Secretary of State advising of Natural England’s intention to prepare 23 Environmental Delivery Plans (EDPs) in England. This includes the preparation of:    16 EDPs for nutrient pollution from development affecting protected sites   7 EDPs for great crested newts (GCN), for development (including infrastructure) in England where GCN are materially present    "
